title: Objects, Classes, Namespaces, and Binding · Runtime Lens: Oop Class Instance
summary: Model a library circulation domain while tracing real Python object and attribute behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop class instance increment in an inspectable library domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define classes and create instances while distinguishing class objects from the instances they construct.
Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
